title: Refresh-ScanGrid and Refresh-Summary defined inside Show-ScanDashboard function scope only
description: The functions Refresh-ScanGrid, Refresh-Summary, and Refresh-ReportsTab are defined inside the Show-ScanDashboard function body, making them inaccessible for unit testing or external invocation. The smoke tests cannot validate these functions independently. This is a testability sin — helper functions should be defined at script scope or module scope where they can be tested.
resolution: Converted Refresh-ScanGrid, Refresh-Summary, and Refresh-ReportsTab from inner functions to scriptblock variables ($RefreshScanGrid, $RefreshSummary, $RefreshReportsTab). Moved $RefreshScanGrid before the event handler loop so .GetNewClosure() closures capture it. All call sites updated to use & $Variable invocation syntax.
